title: conyza laevigata
intro: Conyza laevigata, also known as smooth fleabane or smooth conyza, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Conyza laevigata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
